Create `site/page-4.html`. 2. Ensure all pages (1, 2, 3, 4) share a navigation structure. 3. Modify `site/page-2.html` to include the shared navigation structure. 3. Modify `site/page-3.html` to include the shared navigation structure. 4. Create `site/page-4.html` including the shared navigation structure. Since the prompt only asks for the output for the current stage, I must generate the necessary files to meet the stage goal. I will assume the shared navigation is a consistent `
